nasb.text: Other seeds fell into the good soil, and as they grew up and increased, they yielded a crop and produced thirty, sixty, and a hundredfold.”

esv.text: And other seeds fell into good soil and produced grain, growing up and increasing and yielding thirtyfold and sixtyfold and a hundredfold.”

cnv.text: 有的落在好土裡，就生長繁茂，結出果實，有三十倍的、有六十倍的、有一百倍的。”

ccb.text: 有些落在沃土里，就发芽生长，结出果实，收成多达三十倍、六十倍、一百倍！”

csbs.text: 可是另有落进好土壤里的，就发芽、生长，不断地结出果实，结出的有三十倍的、有六十倍的、有一百倍的。”
